title: orthopenthea minor
intro: Orthopenthea minor, also known as the Indian staff vine or staff vine, is a climbing plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orthopenthea minor include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its therapeutic properties.
